title: Cell culture
steps: These cells were maintained in Dulbecco’s modified Eagle’s medium (DMEM, Gibco)supplemented with 10% (v/v) heat-inactivated fetal bovine serum (FBS, Gibco)and 1x anti-anti (Gibco).
Cells were routinely passaged every 2-3 days when they reached 80-90% confluence and maintained at 37℃ in 5% CO 2
Cells were maintained in FreeStyle‱ 293 Expression Medium (Gibco) supplementedwith 1% FBS and 1x anti-anti.
Cells were routinely passaged every 2-3 days, maintained at 37℃ in 5% CO 2, and Incubated with shaking at 100 rpm.
Cells were maintained in 1:1 DMEM:F‐12 media (Thermo Scientific)supplemented with 10% (v/v) FBS, 2 mM L‐glutamine, 100 U/ml penicillin and0.1 mg/ml streptomycin
Cells were routinely passaged every 2-3 days when they reached 80-90% confluence and maintained at 37℃ in 5% CO 2
Cells were cultured in DMEM with supplemented with 10% (v/v) FBS,2 mM L‐glutamine, 100 U/ml penicillin and 0.1 mg/ml streptomycin
Cells were routinely passaged every 2-3 days when they reached 80-90% confluence and maintained at 37℃ in 5% CO 2
All cell lines were confirmed mycoplasma negative using MycoAlert Detection kit every 1 month.
creator: Yongjia Duan
